childhood.familyBackground: Real estate magnate family. Built property empire across Hong Kong and Southeast Asia.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 부동산 재벌 가족. 홍콩 및 동남아시아 전역의 자산 제국 구축
childhood.education: University of Hong Kong, civil engineering
childhood.earlyLife: Born into Hong Kong's post-war real estate boom. Early exposure to development and construction.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 홍콩의 전후 부동산 호황에 태어남. 개발 및 건설에 조기 노출

careerTimeline.event: Joined family real estate development company
Expanded into commercial and residential mega-projects
careerTimeline.eventKo: 상업 및 주거 대형 프로젝트로 확장

careerTimeline.event: Diversified across Hong Kong, China, and Southeast Asia
careerTimeline.eventKo: 홍콩, 중국 및 동남아시아 전역에 다각화

failures.description: Asian property market downturn affected developments
failures.descriptionKo: 아시아 부동산 시장 둔화가 개발에 영향

quotes.text: Hong Kong development shaped Asia's future

personalTraits.knownFor: Leading Hong Kong property development into Asia
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports education and healthcare in Hong Kong
